source_type: Recycler XRF/ICP databases (Ecotrade EcoCat, AutoCatalystMarket, ConverterDatabase.com, BR Metals, PMR)
what_it_provides: Total Pt, Pd, Rh grams per physical converter unit, indexed by OEM serial number stamped on shell. 20,000+ entries in Ecotrade alone.
what_it_does_not_provide: Does NOT give: g/L concentration, washcoat chemistry, layer structure, Ce:Zr ratio, promoters, substrate dimensions. Only total grams.
confidence_for_am_homologation: HIGH for total PGM grams. This is the gold standard — actual measurement on ground converter material.
access_method: Commercial subscription: Ecotrade ~€5k/yr; ConverterDatabase ~$2k/yr. Some offer per-query pricing.
recommended_action_for_bosal: Subscribe to Ecotrade EcoCat. Cross-ref OEM part # via TecDoc/TecAlliance to map serial → vehicle model.

source_type: Johnson Matthey annual PGM Market Report; SFA Oxford biannual PGM outlook; WPIC Platinum Quarterly
what_it_provides: Regional aggregate: average Pd g/vehicle Europe gasoline, average Pt g/vehicle Europe diesel, Pt-for-Pd substitution koz, total demand by region.
what_it_does_not_provide: Does NOT give: per-OEM breakdown, per-engine family, washcoat chemistry, g/L per brick. Only regional averages.
confidence_for_am_homologation: HIGH for market trends and average loading direction. Not for specific vehicle targeting.
access_method: JM Report: free PDF download from matthey.com (May each year). SFA Oxford: subscription ~£15k/yr. WPIC: free quarterly.
recommended_action_for_bosal: Download JM 2025 Report for aggregate validation. Consider SFA subscription for per-OEM data (they offer this as a premium tier).

source_type: Patent filings on Espacenet/Google Patents from BASF (WO2022/034250, etc.), Umicore (EP4015064), Johnson Matthey (EP4015065)
what_it_provides: Specific washcoat formulations: support oxide, Ce:Zr:RE molar composition, BaO/ZrO₂/Y₂O₃ promoter wt%, PGM type and g/L per layer, layer structure, substrate type.
what_it_does_not_provide: Does NOT guarantee: that the patent formulation = the actual production catalyst. Patents show R&D state, not final calibration. Some patents are defensive filings.
confidence_for_am_homologation: HIGH for chemistry direction and formulation architecture. MEDIUM for exact production values.
access_method: Free: Espacenet (worldwide.espacenet.com). Search CPC class B01D53/9445 or B01J23/63, filtered by applicant and date 2018-2024.
recommended_action_for_bosal: Assign 1 engineer to mine patents for each OEM's catalyst supplier. Map patent → OEM via supplier relationships (e.g., BASF→VW, Umicore→BMW/Toyota).

source_type: SAE Technical Papers (e.g., 2017-01-0935, 2019-01-0743), JSAE papers on TWC formulation
what_it_provides: Published measured data: light-off curves, PGM loading, some washcoat detail, aging behaviour. Peer-reviewed.
what_it_does_not_provide: Often anonymised ('a European OEM'). May not specify exact vehicle model. Data from 2-3 years before publication.
confidence_for_am_homologation: HIGH for performance data and formulation principles. MEDIUM for mapping to specific current production vehicles.
access_method: SAE MOBILUS subscription (~$1k/yr) or per-paper (~$35 each). Search 'three-way catalyst Euro 6' + year.
recommended_action_for_bosal: Search SAE for papers by BASF/Umicore/JM authors. These often disclose more than patents about real-world performance.

source_type: Total PGM grams (from recycler) ÷ substrate volume (from OEM service data or NGK/Corning published specs) = g/L. Or: patent g/L × known substrate volume = total grams.
what_it_provides: Calculated g/L or total grams. Cross-validation when two independent sources agree.
what_it_does_not_provide: Calculation depends on correct substrate volume assumption. Service manual dimensions may differ from actual production (running changes).
confidence_for_am_homologation: MEDIUM. Derived values are directionally correct ±15-20%. Sufficient for initial AM formulation scoping.
access_method: Combine recycler DB subscription + TecDoc substrate data + OEM service manual.
recommended_action_for_bosal: Use as starting point. Validate with ICP-OES on 2-3 actual OEM converters per platform.

source_type: Industry trend extrapolation: JM aggregate trends × known platform sharing × patent-disclosed formulations for that OEM's supplier.
what_it_provides: Estimated PGM loading, washcoat composition, and OSC for newest platforms (2022-2025) where no recycler assay or patent data exists yet.
what_it_does_not_provide: No direct measurement or OEM disclosure. Based on assumption that new platform follows supplier's patented technology.
confidence_for_am_homologation: LOW-MEDIUM. Useful for forward planning but NOT for final AM calibration. Must be validated.
access_method: Engineering judgement based on Tier 1 sources.
recommended_action_for_bosal: ⚠ DO NOT use Tier 3 values for final R103 homologation calibration. ICP-OES validation mandatory before proceeding.

source_tier: DATA POINT TRACEABILITY — Which values in Sheet 'ECS Component Database' come from which tier

what_it_does_not_provide: Current Coverage in This DB
confidence_for_am_homologation: What Bosal Should Do

color_code: Recycler assay ÷ substrate vol; Patent filings (g/L stated)
what_it_provides: JM aggregate trend × OEM platform analogy
what_it_does_not_provide: ~40% Tier 1, ~35% Tier 2, ~25% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: ICP-OES on OEM parts for top 20 platforms

what_it_does_not_provide: ~30% Tier 1, ~40% Tier 2, ~30% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Recycler DB subscription for direct grams

color_code: OEM service manuals; NGK/Corning product catalogues
what_it_does_not_provide: ~50% Tier 1, ~35% Tier 2, ~15% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: TecDoc/TecAlliance subscription for OEM part data

what_it_does_not_provide: ~40% Tier 1, ~40% Tier 2, ~20% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Cross-check with substrate supplier data sheets

source_type: Estimated from patent for same supplier/era
what_it_does_not_provide: ~30% Tier 1, ~30% Tier 2, ~40% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Weigh OEM substrate before/after WC removal (acid strip)

what_it_does_not_provide: ~25% Tier 1, ~25% Tier 2, ~50% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Patent mining + SEM-EDS cross-section analysis on OEM parts

what_it_does_not_provide: ~25% Tier 1, ~25% Tier 2, ~50% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: XRD + ICP on OEM washcoat samples

source_type: Calculated from total WC × typical OSC fraction
what_it_does_not_provide: ~20% Tier 1, ~20% Tier 2, ~60% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: H₂-TPR or O₂ pulse chemisorption on OEM parts — CRITICAL for AM OBD design

what_it_provides: Estimated from PGM loading + substrate type
what_it_does_not_provide: ~15% Tier 1, ~25% Tier 2, ~60% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Synthetic gas bench testing on OEM parts

color_code: OEM service manuals; AECC tech summaries
what_it_does_not_provide: ~60% Tier 1, ~30% Tier 2, ~10% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Already well-established; low risk

color_code: OEM homologation documents (some published via UNECE)
what_it_does_not_provide: ~20% Tier 1, ~30% Tier 2, ~50% Tier 3
confidence_for_am_homologation: Request from OEM type approval authority or from catalyst coating supplier

source_tier: RECOMMENDED DATA ACQUISITION PLAN FOR BOSAL R&D

what_it_does_not_provide: What You Get
confidence_for_am_homologation: Why It Matters

what_it_does_not_provide: Maps every OEM serial # to Pt/Pd/Rh total grams. Cross-ref via TecDoc for vehicle model matching.
confidence_for_am_homologation: Gives real measured PGM per converter for all major OEMs. Foundation for AM loading decisions.

what_it_does_not_provide: Buy OEM converters from dealers. Grind washcoat, acid digest, ICP-OES for Pt/Pd/Rh. Also XRD for Ce:Zr.
confidence_for_am_homologation: Validates this database. Gives actual g/L per brick. Required evidence for ECE R103 homologation files.

what_it_does_not_provide: Epoxy-mount, polish, SEM-EDS elemental mapping. Shows layer structure, PGM distribution, WC thickness.
confidence_for_am_homologation: Validates patent-derived layer structure. Confirms L1 vs L2 PGM split for AM formulation matching.

what_it_does_not_provide: Measure actual OSC capacity on fresh and aged OEM washcoat samples.
confidence_for_am_homologation: THE most critical test for your 'too active fresh AM' problem. Gives you the OSC target number.

what_it_does_not_provide: Systematic Espacenet search: B01D53/9445 + B01J23/63, by BASF/Umicore/JM, 2018-2025.
confidence_for_am_homologation: Low cost; high chemistry detail. Assign 1 engineer part-time.

what_it_does_not_provide: Per-OEM, per-region PGM loading data. The only source that breaks down JM-level aggregate to OEM-specific.
confidence_for_am_homologation: Best available data for forward-looking planning (Euro 7 preparation).

what_it_does_not_provide: Light-off curves (T₅₀ CO/HC/NOx) on your AM catalyst vs OEM fresh and aged.
confidence_for_am_homologation: Confirms your AM fresh ≈ OEM aged performance match before vehicle-level OBD testing.
